mapper.select: SELECT id, place_id AS placeId, rule_type AS ruleType, start_date AS startDate, end_date AS endDate, week_day AS weekDay, holiday_name FROM rental_place_closed_rule WHERE place_id = #{placeId} AND deleted = 0 AND ( (start_date IS NULL AND end_date IS NULL) OR (start_date <= #{toDate} AND (end_date IS NULL OR end_date >= #{fromDate})) ) ORDER BY COALESCE(start_date, '1970-01-01') ASC, rule_type ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rental_place_closed_rule ( place_id, rule_type, start_date, end_date, week_day, holiday_name, created_at, created_by, updated_at, updated_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{placeId}, #{rule.ruleType}, #{rule.startDate}, #{rule.endDate}, #{rule.weekDay}, #{rule.holidayName}, NOW(), #{actorId}, NOW(), #{actorId}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE rental_place_closed_rule SET rule_type = #{rule.ruleType}, start_date = #{rule.startDate}, end_date = #{rule.endDate}, week_day = #{rule.weekDay}, holiday_name = #{rule.holidayName}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{actorId} WHERE id = #{id} AND place_id = #{placeId} AND deleted = 0
